name: n8n Ops
description: List, inspect, and trigger n8n workflows from OpenClaw agents. Optional edit tools behind a flag with auto-backup and rollback on failure.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the n8n instance, e.g. http://192.0.2.89:5678

apiKey.description: n8n public API key (X-N8N-API-KEY). Leave blank and set N8N_API_KEY in the environment instead.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable to read the API key from when apiKey is blank.

enableEdit.description: Enable write tools (save/activate/deactivate/cancel-execution). Off by default.

maxExecutionLogBytes.description: Max bytes of execution log returned inline. Larger logs are truncated with a tail hint.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for n8n API calls.

backupDir.description: Directory for pre-save workflow snapshots. Defaults to ~/.n8n-backups.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Your n8n instance, e.g. http://host:5678. Container-direct IPs work fine if routable.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Generate in n8n Settings -> API. Use keyRef to an env var, not inline.

enableEdit.label: Enable Edit Tools
enableEdit.help: Exposes save/activate/deactivate/cancel-execution. save has a confirm-gate and auto-backup; cancel stops running executions on the server.

maxExecutionLogBytes.label: Max Log Bytes
maxExecutionLogBytes.help: Truncate large execution logs to keep tool responses within token budgets.
